scripts.build: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter worker --if-present build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter @infamous-freight/shared --filter ai --filter worker --filter web --if-present typecheck
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter ai --filter worker --filter @infamous/api --filter mobile --filter web --if-present lint
scripts.test: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter ai --filter web --if-present test
scripts.test:ci: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter ai --filter web --if-present test -- --runInBand
scripts.validate: pnpm run build && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test
